_comment: One entry per vendored battle sheet in assets/sprites/battle/.
slice-sheets.mjs REFUSES to slice a sheet with no entry here — that is
on purpose: no asset ships without attribution (CONTENT_REFERENCE.md §14).
Before adding an entry, verify the artist/license in Tuxemon's
ATTRIBUTIONS.md, or the creature's wiki.tuxemon.org page when it is
missing there. sourceCommit is the Tuxemon commit the sheet was pulled from.
